description_long: This stone block is a rectangular, elongated slab with a visually striking pattern of alternating black and gray stripes running lengthwise across its top surface. The sides feature a geometric design with diagonal black insets set into a gray stone background, giving it a modern, architectural appearance. The block appears solid and heavy, with sharp, clean edges and a flat upper surface suitable for supporting weight. The material resembles polished or finely cut granite or concrete, suggesting durability and resistance to weathering. The surface finish is matte to slightly rough, with minimal gloss or reflectivity. There are no visible engravings, markings, or signs of significant wear, indicating it is either new or well-maintained.
description: A rectangular stone block with alternating black and gray stripes on top and geometric diagonal patterns on the sides, made of solid, durable stone.
description_view_0: Front view shows the long face with diagonal black insets and the striped top surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the narrow end with vertical black and gray stripes and no diagonal pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the same diagonal black insets and striped top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the narrow striped end.
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; surfaces appear clean and edges are sharp, indicating recent installation or regular maintenance.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: forms part of a continuous barrier or edge
